channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dangerous and exposed fixings, 18th May
item.description:
There is a street sign outside papa johns pizza in hillview road hucclecote that has dangerous and sharp edges. it ripped by coat and its a eye level and dangerous
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hillview Road, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Roadwork signs left behind, 18th May
item.description:
Bishops Cleeve along main road just after the Cloisters, before the roundabout and also in the Cloisters on the left on the grassy verge/play area. They have been there over a month now. Please could they be removed?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Cloisters, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous sign fixing on disused parking sign, 18th May
item.description:
There is a street sign outside papa johns pizza in hillview road hucclecote that has dangerous and sharp edges. it ripped my coat and its a eye level and dangerous. it has very sharp exposed edges on a pathway used by school children and other pedestrians
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cowsley Drive, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Abandoned car, 18th May
item.description:
Granley road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 62, Granley Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road bridge crossing M5, concrete damaged, 18th May
item.description:
16/5/26: Driving southbound on M5, approaching Lobleys Drive road bridge over M5 carriageway : concrete of bridge appeared eroded with exposure of steelwork sub-structure. I also noticed the same issue on next road bridge crossing M5 south-bound (Upton Lane, GL4 8BG)
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lobleys Drive, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
